query_normalized: predicting the impact of processing temperature on the grain size of rolled aluminum alloys materials science
rationale: The paper focuses on a methodological comparison of characterization techniques (DCT vs. EBSD) for measuring grain size in steel, rather than investigating the causal mechanism or empirical relationship between processing temperature and grain size in aluminum alloys.
